title: STRONGTHIUM Carburetor 79cc 80cc 99cc for Predator Coleman CT100U CC100X Champion Generators Powermate Edger
features: The aftermarket carburetor fits for Coleman CT100U CC100X RB100 98cc 97cc Predator 79 cc Massimo MB100 mini bikes; for SK100 CK100-S Go kart , Realtree RTK100 Go kart; 154F 3.0 hp OHV Engine
Fits for 79cc 80cc Generators Predator 1400/1800 Champion generator 1200 thru 1500 watt Firman 1050/1300 Wen 56200i 79.7cc, for Buffalo Sportsman gen1100 & gen154 1500 / 2000 watt Homelite hgca1400
Fits for Powermate Edger PWLE0799 PWLE0799F2N Champion 7 ton and 9 ton log splitter with the 80cc engine etc
Please check the product images before ordering, note the 15mm carb intake with a 37mm center to center mounting holes.
Package includs 1ps carb assy with mounting gaskets 1pcs fuel hose.
